subject: refactor(docs): extract suggested implementations into standalone files
body:
Moves each suggested implementation from inline CLAUDE.md content into
separate files under docs/implementations/ for better organization and
maintainability. CLAUDE.md now contains a reference table linking to each file.

Tags: documentation, refactor, organization
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: docs-organization
Semver: patch
